evidence: "The best part of this somewhat forlorn movie was watching the surviving partner emerge through the various stages of grief."
"I found this movie a worthy rental of which kept my interest. There is lots of action and no boring parts filled with stupid people like in the Sharknado movies."
"The characters were multi-faceted as individuals, not just some actors emoting lines."
"The movie takes a sharp left turn to insanity."
"Worst part of movie was that it dragged too long."
"Movie was slow as molasses running down a tree."
"I liked Lagartha's storyline throughout season 5 and I was surprised to see the Seer's unhappy death."
"The house on the fog shrouded moors was clearly spooky and I was glad to see the actor who played the Wildling king on Game of Thrones lending some much needed support."
"I have long admired the character development of Katniss Everdeen from the previous three movies."
"I revisited this series when it became available under Amazon Prime."
"The haunting piano accompaniment (especially 'Promise'), the eerie ash polluted fog, the foreshadowing siren blasts, and the unique creatures of the damned make this movie true horror."
"The location, where it actually featured the actors trekking and trudging through real snow with backpacks loaded with appropriate gear, helped build up the suspense."

"Love this timeless movie. Have watched it several times. It gets you thinking sensibly about the probability of an afterlife and the responsibility we have towards facing the consequences of our actions."
"I was kept wondering whether this was a true horror story or was I viewing an entire family's deep descent into further psychiatric madness and oblivion."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of horror, drama, and action genres, with a strong preference for emotional depth and high production quality. They tend to favor complex narratives but have a notable dislike for slow pacing in films.
